package rulefixtures

// scenario for repeated_string_trim_normalize: chains like `strings.TrimSpace(strings.ToLower(strings.TrimPrefix(s, ...)))` that scan the string multiple times
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule632NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario632Negative(records []Rule632NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
